title: Input validation returns 422 instead of 400
evidence: test_main.py:52 asserts status_code==422; FastAPI/Pydantic default is 422 Unprocessable Entity for validation errors rather than 400 Bad Request
suggestion: Add a custom exception handler to return 400 for ValidationError if strict HTTP semantics are desired

title: Maintainability score is low (0.27)
evidence: scores.json maintainability=0.2659 — retort scorer flagged this; possible causes: no type annotations on db.py return types, no docstrings on route handlers
suggestion: Add return type annotations to db.py functions and brief docstrings to route handlers
